title: Conductor settings
description: Schema for user-scoped Conductor settings files (~/.conductor/settings.toml or its .json equivalent). The structure is the same for both formats.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor autocomplete and validation.

claude_code_executable_path.description: Override the Claude Code executable path, for example hsclaude.

claude_provider.description: Provider backing Claude, for example anthropic, bedrock, or vertex.

environment_variable_files.description: Env files to parse for environment variables.

file_include_globs.description: Glob patterns for files surfaced in the workspace file picker.

archive_on_merge.description: Archive a workspace automatically when its PR merges.

branch_prefix_type.description: How branch name prefixes are generated.

delete_branch_on_archive.description: Delete the workspace branch when archiving.

worktree_push_auto_setup_remote.description: Automatically configure the upstream remote on first push.

default_effort_level.description: Default Claude effort level for new chats.

review_effort_level.description: Claude effort level used for code reviews.

default_thinking_level.description: Default Codex thinking level for new chats.

review_thinking_level.description: Codex thinking level used for code reviews.

default_fast_mode.description: Enable fast mode by default for new chats.

default_plan_mode.description: Start new chats in plan mode by default.

code_review.description: Custom prompt for the code review action.

create_pr.description: Custom prompt for the create PR action.

fix_errors.description: Custom prompt for the fix errors action.

general.description: Custom prompt appended to every agent session.

rename_branch.description: Custom prompt for the rename branch action.

resolve_merge_conflicts.description: Custom prompt for the resolve merge conflicts action.

archive.description: Shell script run when a workspace is archived.

auto_run_after_setup.description: When true, starts the run script automatically after a new local workspace finishes setup.

run.description: Shell script run to start the app for a workspace.

run_mode.description: How the run script is executed.

setup.description: Shell script run when a workspace is created.

ssh_key_path.description: Path to the SSH private key used for cloud workspaces.

tool_approvals_enabled.description: Require approval before agents run tools.

vertex_project_id.description: Google Vertex project ID for Claude.
